subTopicTitle: Poems of the Decade (Anthology) — Please Hold — Ciaran O’Driscoll

items.prompt: Briefly summarize the central theme of 'Please Hold' by Ciaran O'Driscoll.
keyPoints: Exploration of frustration with modern technology
Critique of impersonal communication
Satirical tone highlighting societal dependence on automation

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: Identify and explain the use of repetition in the poem 'Please Hold'.
keyPoints: Repetition of the phrase 'Please hold'
Emphasizes endless waiting and frustration
Reflects monotony and lack of control

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: What role does irony play in 'Please Hold'?
keyPoints: Irony in the contrast between automated responses and human emotion
Highlighting the absurdity of technological reliance
Use of irony to critique societal norms

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: Imagine a future where technology has advanced even further than in 'Please Hold'. How might the themes of the poem apply to this new scenario?
keyPoints: Continued loss of personal interactions
Increased frustration and alienation
Potential for deeper societal critique

markingCriteria.full: Applies themes accurately to the scenario with detailed explanation
markingCriteria.partial: Applies themes with limited explanation or detail
markingCriteria.none: Fails to apply themes appropriately or inaccurately

items.prompt: Apply the use of tone in 'Please Hold' to another modern setting, such as an online customer service chat.
keyPoints: Impersonal and detached tone
Frustration evoked by automated responses
Relates to experiences of inefficiency and disconnection

markingCriteria.full: Applies tone effectively to the setting with detailed explanation
markingCriteria.partial: Applies tone with limited explanation or detail

Lack of resolution or progress

Explain: Highlights absurdity and frustration in modern communication
Link: Connects to broader societal implications of technology
